title: matter product naming propagation

review_policy.note: Per user instruction, full Claude review execution is skipped going forward and must not be counted as a valid review receipt.

tuw_evidence.title: Propagate product naming decision to strategy, decision register, and naming rules

commands.purpose: Verify product strategy no longer labels the naming rule as a recommendation
Verify product strategy records MAT-DEC-04 as decided
Verify the decision-status table no longer has MAT-DEC-04 pending
Verify the decision-status table has one decided MAT-DEC-04 row

commands.command: grep -n 'Four-Layer Naming Table\|기계 식별자 리네이밍 금지\|L2-6 Glossary Intake' docs/launch/matter-naming-rules.md
commands.output:
8:## Four-Layer Naming Table
19:기계 식별자 리네이밍 금지: package names, product-contract IDs, script names, closeout-pack references, ledger IDs, and historical evidence links must not be renamed from `law-firm-os` or Law Firm OS solely for product branding.
27:## L2-6 Glossary Intake
commands.purpose: Verify naming rules include the required table, machine identifier rename ban, and L2-6 intake section

notes: The owner product naming decision is sourced from workbook/matter-post-cp-launch-plan.md section 1.
Machine identifiers are preserved to avoid closeout evidence drift.

tuw_evidence.title: Align user-visible brand string and verify checklist completion

commands.command: grep -rn "matter by AMIC Law" apps/web/src || true
commands.purpose: Verify old UI brand phrase is absent from web source

commands.output: apps/web/src/components/MatterLogo.jsx:6:    <div className={compact ? "matter-logo compact" : "matter-logo"} aria-label="matter by AMIC">
commands.purpose: Verify MatterLogo aria-label exactly matches the UI brand
Verify the naming checklist crosswalk has five completed rows
Run the required full test suite after UI/text changes

commands.output: vite build completed; 1645 modules transformed; built in 663ms
commands.purpose: Verify the web application still builds after the UI accessibility label change
Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: The UI image alt text remains AMIC Law because it names the logo image asset; the UI brand aria-label is matter by AMIC.
Full Claude review is waived by user instruction and is not counted as valid review evidence.

non_claims: This record does not rename machine identifiers.
This record does not modify closed CP evidence.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
